2024-04-11 10:36:15Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Zscaler (ZS): Should You Buy?When deciding whether to buy, sell, or hold a stock, investors often rely on analyst recommendations. 2024-04-12 10:41:104 AI Stocks With Ample Growth Potential to Buy in 2024Here, we present four top-ranked tech stocks, NVDA, TWLO, META and ZS, which stand out for their innovative AI solutions, making them attractive choices for investors eyeing the AI market in 2024.2024-04-12
2024-04-12 11:56:05Zscaler (ZS) Signs Agreement to Acquire Airgap NetworksZscaler (ZS) is set to acquire Airgap Networks to extend its Zero Trust security and networking services portfolio.2024-04-12
2024-04-13 00:56:38Zscaler: This Dip Is A Perfect Buying Opportunity (Rating Upgrade)Zscaler, a cloud-based security provider, has seen its stock price decline despite positive earnings results. Upgrading Zscaler to bullish and recommending investors to buy and hold on for a rebound to the $210 level. Zscaler has long-term growth potential due to its focus on cloud security, recession-proof demand, and a strong growth/profitability balance.2024-04-13
2024-04-13 05:39:14Zscaler: High Growth Should Continue For The Foreseeable FutureZscaler is expected to see accelerated growth in the near term, with sustained growth above 30% and a proven track record of winning market share. The company offers cloud-based enterprise and network security solutions, positioning itself as a crucial enabler of secure SD-WAN and benefiting from the long-term tailwind of increasing cybersecurity needs. Additional growth drivers, such as federal spending and a new go-to-market model, are expected to support Zscaler's growth above 30% and justify its premium valuation compared to peers.2024-04-13
2024-04-13 07:28:003 Stocks You Need to Buy NOW for Life-Changing ReturnsWhen stocks maintain sales growth and returns on invested capital over long periods, they can be tremendous compounders. Let's discuss some stocks for life-changing returns with multibagger potential.2024-04-13
2024-04-14 07:32:23Zscaler: Buy The Dip, As Growth Drivers And Management Execution Will Drive UpsideZscaler continues to gain market share and deepen adoption among enterprise customers, with growing ARR, success in the federal market vertical and improving profitability. The company is projected to grow its revenue and non-GAAP operating income by 31% YoY and 64% YoY respectively in FY24. While Zscaler faces competitive threats, it is investing in R&D to deliver robust product innovations and mitigate AI-assisted cybersecurity risks.2024-04-14
